summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FoodHub food delivery app with Zomato-style home page, order tracking, cancellation flow, and owner notifications. All major features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent components

passed_tests: All 32 backend API endpoints working correctly
Home page loads with Zomato-style design
Location selector dialog opens and functions properly
Banner carousel displays with 3 banners and auto-rotate dots
Search functionality works correctly
Location filters work and update restaurant grid
Customer login (customer@test.com / customer123) successful
Restaurant detail page loads and items can be added to cart
Sticky View Cart bar appears after adding items
Cart page loads with all sections (items, notes, coupon, delivery, payment)
Order placement via COD works successfully
Orders page shows Track Order buttons for active orders
Order Tracking page loads with live status steps
Cancel order dialog opens with minimum 10 character validation
Order cancellation works and sends notifications to restaurant
Owner login (owner@test.com / owner123) successful
Owner dashboard loads with sidebar navigation
Owner notifications tab shows cancellation alerts
Owner dashboard shows management UI only (no public browsing)
Admin login (admin@foodhub.com / Admin@123) successful
Admin dashboard shows stats and user management
Banner carousel endpoint returns 3 banners
Order cancellation API validates minimum 10 character reason
Owner notifications API returns cancellation alerts
All authentication flows working correctly
